list.title: Items
list.emptyDescription: Create an item to see it in the table.

itemExtensions.hint: Swap this placeholder for the %{integrationId} package or remote MFE. Active Toolinator view: %{viewName}.

itemEmails.title: Emails
itemEmails.placeholderBody: Engagement surface mirrors Planroom: communication banner, then threaded-style list from the same REST shape.

itemRelatedItems.title: Related items
itemRelatedItems.placeholderBody: Item tab uses `@procore/related-items` RelatedItems (v2 related_items APIs), not JSON Tabulator + Mirage v1 table.
itemRelatedItems.relatedItemsPackageHint: Related items UI from `@procore/related-items`. Mirage stubs v2 endpoints; use staging or wire real services for full behavior.

itemDocuments.title: Documents
itemDocuments.placeholderBody: Item tab uses `@procore/labs-file-select` ConnectedFileSelect (local + Documents), not Mirage JSON Tabulator.
itemDocuments.connectedFileSelectHint: Connected file select: local uploads and project Documents (configure document_service / staging per labs-file-select README).
